category_sources: Official Klavaro English page describes keyboard/language-independent typing tutor features.
source_facts.description says it is a free touch typing tutor program.
display_name_sources: Official homepage title is 'Klavaro Touch Typing Tutor'.
docs_sources: Official English homepage is the best English overview when translated manual is unavailable.
Official Klavaro Help page has a Documentation section.
repo_sources: Official Klavaro English page links to Code repository on SourceForge.
SourceForge project Code_SVN page is the project's source-control browser.
tags_sources: Official Klavaro page lists keyboard layouts, typing exercises, and progress charts.
source_facts.description identifies a touch typing tutor.
